stemHtml: Changes in temperature of the fuel affect its density, volume and dielectric value Er. An increase in temperature causes…

options.a: an increase in volume, increase in density and increase in Er.
options.b: a decrease in volume, decrease in density and decrease in Er.
options.c: a decrease in volume, increase in density and increase in Er.
options.d: an increase in volume, decrease in density and decrease in Er.
